title: Iran War Shipping Update - April 29, 2026 | UANI
summary: The U.S. blockade of Iranian ports targets vessels entering and exiting Iranian ports, as well as vessels carrying contraband and sanctionable oil cargoes.
contents:
## Source Context

OSINT collection from the @pizzainwatch Twitter/X account, focused on maritime vessel tracking sanctions Iran Russia tanker AIS, surfaces a recent news report linked below. The source @pizzainwatch consistently covers this beat and analysts often cross-reference outside reporting against the account.

## Reported Development

The cited article, **Iran War Shipping Update - April 29, 2026 | UANI**, published on 2026-04-30, describes activity that aligns with the source's monitoring scope. Key details from the reporting follow.

> The U.S. blockade of Iranian ports targets vessels entering and exiting Iranian ports, as well as vessels carrying contraband and sanctionable oil cargoes.

## Analytical Note

This event captures publicly reported activity tied to the @pizzainwatch coverage area. The linked article supplies the primary citation.
